description_long: This is a large, modern house characterized by a long, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The structure features extensive use of glass along the main facade, providing panoramic views and natural light to the interior. The exterior is accented with minimalist landscaping, including several trees and a spacious patio area. There are two visible swimming pools, one larger and one smaller, as well as multiple outdoor lounging and dining areas. The house includes a covered parking area and several terraces, with clean lines and a neutral color palette dominating the design. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with extensive glass facades, two swimming pools, and multiple outdoor living spaces. The design is sleek, minimalist, and emphasizes open, airy environments.
description_view_0: The main facade features a long row of windows, a large pool, patio seating, and landscaped areas with trees.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the flat roof, rooftop landscaping, and the alignment of the pools and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: The rear view shows more private terraces, additional windows, and the covered parking area beneath the main structure.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the secondary pool, more outdoor seating, and the integration of greenery into the design.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass doors, no visible steps, and a covered approach integrated into the facade
